name: Solana Trader
description: Public edition V1-Upgraded — Solana trading agent with X/Twitter social intel (read-only, no posting), standardized tool envelopes, intelligence lab, prompt injection scrubbing, and split skill architecture. Full V1 trading capabilities plus 17 new intelligence tools.

orchestratorUrl.description: Base URL of the trading orchestrator API

walletId.description: Wallet ID (UUID string) for this agent's trading account

apiKey.description: API key obtained from signup or https://traderclaw.ai/register

externalUserId.description: External user ID for signup (auto-generated if not provided)

refreshToken.description: Refresh token from last session (auto-populated after authentication)

recoverySecret.description: Consumable recovery secret used to restore a session after refresh-token failure

walletPublicKey.description: Solana wallet public key (auto-populated after session establishment)

walletPrivateKey.description: DEPRECATED — use env TRADERCLAW_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY or --wallet-private-key arg. Never store private keys in config files.

apiTimeout.description: HTTP request timeout in milliseconds (on-chain trades can take time)

agentId.description: Agent ID for event-to-agent forwarding (e.g., 'main'). When set, subscriptions automatically include this agentId so the orchestrator forwards stream events to your Gateway via /v1/responses.

gatewayBaseUrl.description: Public HTTPS URL of your OpenClaw Gateway used by orchestrator event forwarding.

gatewayToken.description: Bearer token used by orchestrator when calling your Gateway /v1/responses.

workspaceDir.description: Override workspace directory path. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/workspace/ or OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_DIR env var.

bootstrapDecisionCount.description: Number of recent decisions to include in bootstrap digest

bootstrapBulletinWindowHours.description: Hours of bulletin entries to include in bootstrap digest

dailyLogRetentionDays.description: Number of days to retain daily log files before pruning

beta.description: Beta feature flags. Enable experimental capabilities that are not yet enabled by default.

xPosting.description: Enable X/Twitter write tools: x_post_tweet and x_reply_tweet. Requires your X App permissions set to Read+Write and tokens regenerated. When false (default), only the 3 read tools are registered (x_read_mentions, x_search_tweets, x_get_thread).

x.description: X/Twitter configuration for read-only social intel tools

consumerKey.description: X App consumer key (shared across all agents)

profiles.description: Per-agent X profiles. Keys are agent IDs.

beta.label: Beta Features
beta.description: Enable experimental features. Set beta.xPosting: true to activate x_post_tweet and x_reply_tweet.
